Platforms & Products.title: Santander Equips All Workers With AI and Seeks $1.15 Billion Business Value
Platforms & Products.summary:
Santander is extending artificial intelligence (AI) tools to all its employees as it works toward its goal of generating over 1 billion euros (about $1.15 billion) in business value from the technology between 2026 and 2028.  The bank already had 40,000 employees using AI tools and, as of Monday (June 22), it is extending the technology […]

Platforms & Products.title: White House Says Anthropic No Longer Security Threat
Platforms & Products.summary:
President Donald Trump has reportedly reconsidered his stance on Anthropic as a national security threat.  The White House earlier this month ordered the artificial intelligence startup to get government approval before permitting foreign individuals, companies or nations from accessing its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models. Platforms & Products.title: Appeals court sides with CFPB's union, blocks job cuts
Platforms & Products.summary: The D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals halted the Trump administration's attempt to fire nearly two-thirds of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau's workforce, upholding a March 2025 injunction.
